description: Composite score: composite = vif + a * nrqm + b * unique. The coefficients are chosen from the theoretical ranges of the pyiqa metrics: a = 1 / NRQM_RANGE_MAX = 1/10 and b = 1 / UNIQUE_RANGE_MAX = 1/3. With these, a * nrqm lies in [0, 1] over the full NRQM range [0, 10], and b * unique lies in [-1, 1] over the full UNIQUE range [-3, 3], giving a symmetric penalty for degraded UNIQUE while keeping the positive half mapped into [0, 1]. VIF enters without a coefficient because it is already bounded in [0, 1]. The composite has no upper cap: a model that exceeds the theoretical metric maxima legitimately scores above 1.0 in the corresponding term.

user_formula.form: composite = vif + a * nrqm + b * unique
